titles.text: New Super Mario World 1: The Twelve Magic Orbs - Powered-Up

descriptions.text: A remake of New Super Mario World 1: The Twelve Magic Orbs which aims to polish the original hack by improving the level design and giving more replay value.
Bowser has stolen the 12 magic orbs from Peach's castle! Mario must put his courage to test and face all sorts of minions in his way. Collect coins and power-ups and save the Mushroom Kingdom!
